description: Initial graph population from the repo. Creates one node per source file and doc.

pr_body: I found a bug in main.py where init_db() is called before the blueprints are registered. Moving the call to after register_blueprint fixes the crash on startup.
Cleaned up the auth module. No logic changes — just extracted helper functions and added docstrings to make the token verification flow easier to follow.

summary: Developer asked the agent to add an `owner_id` column to the task table. Agent read the database models file, modified the Task class to add the column, and updated the migration script.

pr_body: Port 3000 conflicts with the local React dev server. Changed the default port in the entry point to 8080. Updated README accordingly.

summary: Developer asked the agent to migrate auth from JWT to session-based auth because of a security review finding. Agent modified auth.py to use Flask-Session instead of PyJWT, removed the generate_token and verify_token functions, and added a server-side session store backed by Redis.

pr_body: After the schema kept changing, we decided to drop the relational model. Replaced SQLAlchemy + PostgreSQL with PyMongo. The models file is now just plain Python dataclasses. The db module now connects to a MongoDB Atlas cluster instead.

summary: Developer asked the agent to rewrite the frontend from React to Vue 3, citing that the team no longer has React expertise after a team change. Agent scaffold a new Vue 3 + Vite project in /client, removed the old React dependencies, and updated the README to reflect the stack change.

pr_title: Move deployment from AWS to GCP Cloud Run
pr_body: AWS credits ran out. Migrating to GCP Cloud Run. Containerized the app with a Dockerfile and added a cloudbuild.yaml. The app now deploys automatically on every push to main via Cloud Build triggers.

new_facts.subject: N-readme
new_facts.object: Deployment target is GCP Cloud Run

pr_title: Add input validation to task creation
pr_body: Added pydantic validation to the POST /tasks/ endpoint. The task creation handler now rejects requests missing a title. Also fixed a small bug in the task listing logic.
